description: A powerful tiling manager for GNOME Shell. Precision tile windows into 9 positions using the number pad, enjoy dynamic grid sizes that cycle on repeated keystrokes, and experience seamless linked resizing for adjacent windows. Includes customizable gaps, center alignment, and integrated workspace navigation.
name: Awesome Tiles
author: Pim Snel, Veli Tasalı, Samet Güzeldemirci
